title: Crispy Fermented Knafeh Meal-Prep
description: This sugar-free-friendly meal-prep dish combines fermented cheese with crispy layers of phyllo dough in a Venezuelan-inspired creation.
instructions: Lay a phyllo sheet on a flat surface and brush with olive oil.
Spread the fermented cheese over half of the phyllo, leaving a small border for sealing.
Drizzle sugar-free syrup evenly over the cheese.
Fold the other half of the phyllo onto the cheese to enclose it tightly.
Place seam-side down in a baking dish and brush with olive oil on top.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve warm.
